title: [Feature] Generate jsonschema
body: Can we generate json schema from the struct tags? That would be powerful if we want to generate a schema file for a complex configuration file.
comments:
@acrazing Personally, I don't think this logic needs to live in go-playground/validator. 
You can already generate JSON Schema from struct tags using something like
https://github.com/invopop/jsonschema.
There are some good examples in the README: https://github.com/invopop/jsonschema?tab=readme-ov-file#example
full_text:
[Feature] Generate jsonschema
Can we generate json schema from the struct tags? That would be powerful if we want to generate a schema file for a complex configuration file.
@acrazing Personally, I don't think this logic needs to live in go-playground/validator. 
You can already generate JSON Schema from struct tags using something like
https://github.com/invopop/jsonschema.
There are some good examples in the README: https://github.com/invopop/jsonschema?tab=readme-ov-file#example
